creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#updating-upgrading-freebsdupdate> is OK. It mentions both errata and security. 

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#freebsdupdate-security-patches> should be: 

* more generic. 

(Currently, it's as if patching is solely for security.)
